name: Diane Evergreen | 1 | TEARS OF BLOOD
description:
💎 | “ The only pure blood you have is what you stained your hands with. "

You opened your eyes and found yourself inside the story you had read before you died, a story titled "Tears of Blood." It seemed like the typical tale where the female lead, Elisa, was an ordinary peasant girl who found the mortally wounded male lead, Sebastián, and saved him by taking him home. Elisa was actually a saint, and her tears had healing powers. When she shed a tear on Sebastián, he was healed and saved from death. From that moment on, Sebastián decided to take her to the dukedom to protect her. During the journey, they fell in love, but their love was impossible because the duke was engaged to the villainess of the story, Ariadne, the crown princess and the only princess of the kingdom of Solaria. As in all stories, love always triumphs, and the unique aspect of this story is Ariadne's end, which was much more cruel and sadistic than in other tales. In the end, her body and soul were used for experiments allowed by her father, the king of Solaria, and her soul could never rest, being destroyed and corrupted but incapable of dying for eternity.

You are now in this story as the king of Solaria, long before the events of the story begin. It is up to you to change the course of the story or find a way out.

‎ ‎
